name: Trail Scout 130
alt: Full suspension trail mountain bike with lime green accents
desc: Versatile 130mm travel machine. Climbs like a goat, descends with confidence. Your do-everything bike.

name: Enduro Charger 170
alt: Aggressive enduro mountain bike with orange accents
desc: 160-180mm of plush travel. Aggressive geometry for when the trails get rowdy. Pedal up, smash down.

name: DH Slayer 200
alt: Heavy duty downhill mountain bike with red accents
desc: 200mm+ dual crown beast. Built for lift-accessed carnage and the steepest, roughest lines you can find.

name: E-Ridge 150
alt: Electric mountain bike with integrated battery
desc: More laps, more trails, more fun. Integrated motor with natural ride feel. The fells without limits.

name: Trail Ridge Pro
alt: Premium trail mountain bike with carbon frame
desc: Carbon frame, Fox 34 fork, dropper post — the trail bike for riders who want the best on every climb and descent.

name: Enduro Fury EX
alt: High-end enduro mountain bike with coil shock
desc: Coil shock, 180mm fork, ultra-slack head angle. Built for racing and pushing limits on the gnarliest terrain.

name: E-Power Plus
alt: Premium electric mountain bike with full carbon frame
desc: Full carbon, 750Wh battery, Fox 36 fork. The ultimate e-MTB for all-day adventures in the Lakes.

name: Gravity Pro DH
desc: Race-spec DH bike. Boxxer Ultimate fork, Super Deluxe coil, high pivot — for riders who live at the bike park.
